policy.browserEvidence: preview-only and never eligible for Mentor, rewards, reputation, scholarships, instructor assessment or official challenge completion
policy.legacyMigrationRule: legacy browser records may be displayed only on explicitly quarantined historical surfaces and may never be promoted to durable truth
policy.communityConsent: default-private, revisioned and transactionally evidenced under canonical tenant/workspace/principal context
policy.sharedJournals: same-tenant privacy-minimized projection of canonical Arena reflections only; pseudonymous aliases use internal tenant/principal seeds; free text is bounded, identifier-redacted and fail-closed for secrets, explicit signals, guaranteed returns and recruitment; no demo, localStorage, exact PnL or internal identity fields
policy.officialChallenges: only journal-reflection-week v1 is official; current-cycle evaluation and post-cycle finalization share one exact Arena trade/reflection evidence authority; ended active enrollments become immutable completed or not_completed records; XP, badge, financial reward, leaderboard, Mentor and instructor outcomes remain disabled
policy.operationalFinalization: hourly persistent systemd scheduling is represented by hardened deployable assets; each run and alert is privacy-minimized and append-only in PostgreSQL when available, with an atomic local spool for database/provider outage; repository merge alone is not proof of host installation

canonicalAuthorities.purpose: tenant/principal-bound default-private schema and database invariants
PostgreSQL-only self/public reads and transaction-coupled consent mutation over canonical Academy cartax identity/progress fields
strict-session profile reads, revisioned consent mutation, tenant-context-bound shared-journal/current-challenge/latest-finalized views and official current-cycle challenge commands
server-only same-tenant pseudonymous and safety-filtered projection from canonical Trading Arena reflections gated by evidenced account consent
strict runtime parsing and secure idempotency identity for the Community journal UI
tenant/principal-bound official challenge enrollment and append-only evidence foundation
terminal completed/not_completed invariants, finalization provenance, due-work index and one finalization event per enrollment
single canonical Arena trade/reflection evidence calculator used by interactive evaluation and finalization
bounded SKIP LOCKED post-cycle worker, per-row savepoint isolation and latest finalized tenant/principal projection
fail-closed current-cycle runtime contract rejecting forged progress, completion and reward fields
fail-closed finalized-result contract that recomputes thresholds and rejects nonzero rewards
direct bounded finalizer runner with explicit unavailable and partial-failure exit codes
append-only scheduled run, alert and delivery-attempt evidence schema
canonical privacy-minimized operational evidence validation, hashing, replay and conflict authority
bounded multi-batch scheduled orchestration, drain classification and 0/1/2 exit authority
atomic private outage-safe spool with HTTPS idempotent retry, delivery archive and quarantine
production one-shot scheduler entrypoint with sanitized output
idempotent validated systemd installation and dry-run authority

legacyModules.reason: localStorage state, browser-generated IDs/timestamps/slippage/PnL and scenario completion
browser-owned journal records remain referenced only by historical preview components; Community journals and official Arena journal do not import or promote them
legacy component types are retained temporarily without localStorage, durable consent, canonical hydration or official evidence authority
contains static educational definitions only; no persistence, browser time, participation, score or completion authority
contains scoring primitives only; browser collection is disabled and callers must supply verified server-derived signals
must not personalize Mentor from browser persistence

consumers.allowedAuthority: hydrated server progress and behavioral snapshot only
self-view of server behavioral snapshot; instructor sharing remains disabled until a separate role/grant authority
journal-reflection-week current server state only; all other challenges remain preview-only; no XP, badge, financial reward, leaderboard or instructor outcome
latest ended immutable completed/not_completed result only; read-only and no browser fallback
navigation and ephemeral profile setup only; no browser persistence or consent authority
same-tenant pseudonymous, identifier-redacted and safety-filtered canonical Arena reflection projection plus revisioned Community consent
not mounted by primary Arena route
not mounted by production scenario route
PostgreSQL Community profile authority only; no runtime DDL, filesystem fallback or simulator_snapshot
